**Subject Line:**  
🚨 Verify Your Account Details to Ensure Continued Service

---

**Body:**

Dear [Customer's First Name],

We're reaching out to ensure the security of your account and to verify your personal information. To continue enjoying our services, please confirm the details below:

**Account Holder Name:** [Customer's Full Name]  
**Account Number:** [Account Number]  
**Email Address:** [Customer's Email Address]  
**Phone Number:** [Customer's Phone Number]

To verify your details, please click the button below or visit the link provided:

[Verify Account Details](https://www.bankname.com/verify-account)

If you're unable to click the link, you can manually visit [www.bankname.com/verify-account](https://www.bankname.com/verify-account) and enter your account details.

This verification is required to ensure that we have the most up-to-date information on file and to protect your account from unauthorized access.

If you have any questions or concerns, please don’t hesitate to contact our customer service team at [Customer Service Phone Number] or reply to this email.

Thank you for being a valued customer.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Job Title]  
[Bank Name]

- **Contact Information:** Provide a legitimate contact method to give the email more credibility.
